name: ai-canvas-codex-plugin
description: Codex-integrated infinite canvas for image generation, visual annotation, and iterative editing.

interface.shortDescription: Create and revise images from natural language on an infinite canvas.
interface.longDescription: AI Canvas lets users ask Codex to open a canvas, generate images, read visual annotations, and place edited versions without dealing with MCP tools or file plumbing.
defaultPrompt: 打开 AI 画布，帮我生成一张图片。
按我画布上的标注修改。
继续处理画布里的 Skill 请求。
